Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.0.0.18 — groundwork for NA/EmjL client support (issue #13). Refactored AddonEmjReader internally so every layout-dependent read (hand tiles, scores, discard counts, call-prompt state, legal actions) routes through an IEmjVariant strategy; the next client variant gets added as a sibling class instead of branching inside the reader. On a client whose addon layout doesn't match any registered variant, the plugin now logs a single "No Emj variant matched this addon layout" warning (after a 2s settle to avoid post-setup false positives) instead of silently mis-parsing through the wrong offsets. New /mjauto variant dump command writes one self-contained file describing the live addon — per-variant probe verdicts, AtkValues, full node tree, memory sample around known offset hotspots, AgentEmj header — so a reporter on an unsupported client can attach one file to issue #13 and the maintainer can implement the missing variant without multiple round-trips. No user-visible change on EU/existing clients: same addon resolves to the same Emj variant, same hints/auto-play behavior.
